titleStmt.title: SII 5.421: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 421. (A.R. No. 132 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalaṟ ṟiruvum porujayamaṭantaiyun tāmaraikkuvimulai jayappuyattiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭṭāmaraikkā
talmātu kaviṉpeṟat tiḷaippa veṇṭirai Uṭutta maṇṭiṇi kiṭakkai Irunilamaṭantai Urimaiyiṟ kaḷippac camaiyamu nitiyun taru
mamun taḻaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi yiṭantoṟu meṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉal keṭakkaṭavuḷ vetiyar Aruntoḻil veḻvic c
eṅkaṉal vaḷaṟpac curutiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅ kulava porutiṟalāḻi pūtalañ cūḻvara Orukai yirucevi mummata nāṟkoṭṭayirāva
tamutal ceyti koṟṟatteṇṭicaiyāṉai Erutta meṟik kaṇṭanā ṭemateṉak kayal kaḷikūrak kocalan tuḷuvan kuccaram pocala makatam
(pocalamakatam) poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅka miḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kauvuṭan teliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉaka mutalā vitimuṟait tikaḷa ve
ṟuveṟu vakuttu mutunilakkiḻamaiyiṉ muṭipuṉai ventaṟ korutaṉināyakaṉeṉ ṟulakettat tirumuṭicūṭic ceṅko lo
ccik koṟṟattāḷk kuḷirkuṭainiḻaṟ kaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vica viṭekatir navamaṇivirasiṁ hāsanattu Uṭaṉ muṭicūṭi Uya
rkulattiruveṉap paṅkayamalaṟkaraṅ kuvittup pāttipar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉiyil cuṭaroḷi mau
lic cūṭāmaṇimeliṭa viṭaccivanta viṇmalaṟciṟaṭik kamalamatukaraṅ kamalameṉ ṟaṇukum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum vi
ṟṟiṟantaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu- vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇṭiyade
varkku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟeḻupattāṟiṉāl maturotaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaik
koyiṟp paḷḷiyaṟaikūṭattup paḷḷippiṭa pallavaraiyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu kiḻvempanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiru
nelveliuṭaiyār koyiṟ patipātamulappaṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyar tevakaṉmikaḷ ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi
Ivvuṭai yār tirumuṉpu tiruñāṉam Ōta maccuṉaṉār vikkiramacoḻatevar kaṇṭa tapasvi kaḷil viṣakaṇṭade var sandhā ṉattu
yillāttevar śiṣya ril tavapperumāḷukkum bhaṭṭa virar sandhā ṉattu ma hāde var śiṣya ril Aṉapāyarukkut tiruvārur vaṭakkilmaṭattil
śi vapāda hṛ taiyar śiṣya ril tirunaṭṭapperumāḷukkum bhikṣā maṭasandhā ṉattu Irāvaḷar pacupatitevar śiṣya ril niṉ ṟaya
ṅka Āṭuvārkkuna tiruvārur vaṭakkilmaṭattu Astra tevar śiṣya ril vantāṉ tevakaḷtevarkkum bhikṣā maṭasandhā ṉattut tirunāki
śva rattu Irāvaḷar śiṣya ril tiruñāṉacampantarkkum Isanthā nattu Irāvaḷar pacupatitevar śiṣya ril kalikaṭintakaiyyarkkum matu
rait teṟkilmaṭasandhā ṉattu nilakaṇṭaśi varśiṣya ril tirunelveli Uṭaiyārkkum tirunelveli māḷikaimaṭattu Aḻakiyanāya
karsandhā ṉattu Uyyakkoṇṭatevar śiṣya ril tirunelveli Uṭaiyārkkum bhikṣā maṭasandhā ṉattu Irāvaḷar pacupatit
evar śiṣya ril śi vamuttikāṭṭiṉārkkum tirunelvelit teṟku(ku)maṭattuk kiḻaimaṭasandhā nattu Aṇukka vaṉtoṇṭar śi
ṣya ril Aṟamuraittaperumāḷukkum Ivarkaḷ vaṟkkattil tiruñāṉam Otumperkkum bho jaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavuk
ku muḷḷināṭṭuc ceravaṉmahāteviccaturvvedi maṅkalattu veṭṭippaṟṟāṉa nila mukkāle Oru māvaraiyum Iṉṉāṭṭu Arik
ecarinallūr veṭṭippaṟṟāṉa nilaṅ kālum melvempaṉāṭṭuc cuttavalliyāṉa viravinotaccaturvve timaṅkalattu v
eṭṭippaṟṟāṉa nilam Aṟumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Eṭṭumāvum muṉṉuṭaiyārait tavittu kārāṇmai miyācciyum ka
ṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyaārācciyum Uḻutāṉkuṭiyum pāṭikāvalum veṭṭipā
ṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkiṟakappeṟum vācaṟppeṟum Ilāñciṉaipeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭ
ṭaṉavum Uṭppaṭap patiṉaiñcāvatu mutal tiruñāṉappura Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇum Eṉṟu Aṇṇaṉ tamiḻap
pallavarayyar namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ivvuṭaiyār tirumuṉpu tiruñāṉam Otum tapasvi kaḷ po patiṉoruvaṟkkum Ivarkaḷ vaṟ
kattil tiruñāṉam Otum perkkum bho jaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Icceravaṉmahāteviccaturvvedi maṅkalattu veṭṭi
ppaṟṟāṉa nila mukkāle Orumāvaraiyum Ivvarikecarinallūr veṭṭipaṟṟāṉa nilam kālum melvempaṉāṭṭuc cuttavaliyāṉa vira
vinotaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu veṭṭippaṟṟāṉa nilam Arumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Eṭṭu māvum muṉṉuṭaiyārait tavittu
kkārāṇmai miyāṭcciyum kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvutāṉa Accum kāriyaārāṭcciyum Uḻutāṉkuṭiyum pāṭikāvalu
m veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkiṟakappeṟum vācalppeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperppa
ṭṭiṉavum Uḷppaṭa Ivāṇṭu mutal tiruñāṉappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Olaiyun taracco
ṉṉom . kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrāti ttavaṟ(c) celvatākak kallilum cempi lum veṭṭivittukkoḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymo
ḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai kaḷāntirukkaināṭṭut tiruvāyiraṅkaṉ Aḻakaṉ cokkaṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu . Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭuc
cakkarapāṇinallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.421 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
